label: Transparent armadillo motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Armadillo transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an armadillo motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A nine-banded armadillo in accurate natural anatomy, low armored body, taupe and warm gray segmented shell plates, pale sandy belly, small alert ears, pointed snout, sturdy clawed feet, tapered banded tail, subtle dry thorn scrub dust tones on the armor but no environment. Natural leathery shell texture, crisp subject edges, distinctive protective silhouette, no extra animals.
Composition/framing: centered complete side-profile cutout with generous padding; full body visible from snout to claws to tail, not cropped. Clean studio lighting that preserves natural taupe armor detail. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no desert scene, no grass, no rocks, no props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no stylized cartoon, no floor plane, no shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Armadillo high-resolution light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive high-resolution light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Armadillo", derived from an armadillo motif: taupe segmented shell armor, sandy belly, warm clay highlights, dark claw/eye details, ribbed banded tail, and thorn scrub grass context. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible protective utility system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 landscape board, composed for 3840x2160 output, large readable labels, fewer larger panels instead of tiny dense text. The final should feel like a crisp 4K design-system source board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Armadillo, Armadillo, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from taupe armor plates, ribbed shell bands, sandy scrub soil, dry grass olive, claw umber, shell highlights, and protective utility equipment. The board must read as armadillo shell and thorn scrub, not generic desert, stone, or safari.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short, high contrast, and legible at gallery preview sizes.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple shield/tool icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, warm sand surfaces, taupe armored primary actions, dry grass accent states, dark umber sidebars, ribbed segmented dividers, subtle shell-plate texture, restrained shadows, dense but organized utility dashboard UI.
Color palette: shell taupe #8d7b69, armor clay #b18466, sand background #eee2cf, scrub grass #7a8052, thorn olive #545737, claw umber #3d2c23, bone highlight #f7ead8, dusk ink #231d19, dusty rose warning #a65e4f.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Armadillo", no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no cropped board edges.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Armadillo dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Armadillo". It must feel like the same light-mode armadillo protective utility system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from armadillo segmented shell armor, taupe plates, sandy belly highlights, dry thorn scrub grass, and dark claw umber details.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, target 3840x2160 feel with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Armadillo, Armadillo, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the armadillo system language: deep umber and night taupe backgrounds, bone highlight foreground text, shell-taupe cards, armor-clay active states, thorn-olive focus rings, scrub-grass charts, ribbed segmented dividers, subtle shell-plate texture. Must read as armadillo shell and thorn scrub, not generic desert, military camouflage, or stone.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, bar chart, line chart, status chips, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple shield/tool icons.
Visual details: deep claw-umber surfaces, armored taupe cards, bone text and hairline dividers, clay controls, olive focus states, scrub-grass chart highlights, restrained contrast, crisp shadcn/tweakcn components, 8px grid, 8px card radius.
Color palette: night umber #17110e, dusk ink #231d19, shell taupe #8d7b69, dark shell #4b3f35, armor clay #b18466, bone highlight #f7ead8, scrub grass #7a8052, thorn olive #545737, dusty rose #a65e4f.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic military camouflage, no tiger orange, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Armadillo".
